question_template: Assume the observer moves {distance_m} meters forward, then rotates {angle_deg} degrees to the {turn_dir}. How many marked objects would be geometrically inside the frontal camera field of view?
answer_rule: Apply egomotion; transform object positions into new camera frame; count objects inside frustum.
quality_checks: ground truth must be generated from simulator state / geometry / navigation / rendering, not from LLM
avoid boundary cases where two options are nearly tied
notes: Reference template only. Adapt field names to your generator.
